steps.title: Parse the equation structure
steps.content:
The equation $14,000 = 2,800 + 200t$ represents:
Total price = Down payment + (Per-month amount × Number of months)

The problem states that 2,800 dollars is the down payment, and $t$ is the number of fixed monthly payments. This means $200t$ is the total of all monthly payments.

steps.title: Determine what 200 represents
steps.content:
If $200t$ equals the total monthly payments across $t$ months, then:
$$\text{Per-month payment} = \frac{200t}{t} = 200$$
So 200 is the fixed monthly payment. Comparing to the choices:
  • "The amount, in dollars, of the down payment": the down payment (2,800 dollars)
  • "The amount, in dollars, of each fixed monthly payment": each fixed monthly payment (200 dollars)
  • "The total amount, in dollars, paid for the car after $t$ fixed monthly payments": total of all monthly payments ($200t$)
  • "The total number of fixed monthly payments": the number of payments ($t$)
That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
